steps.title: Follow the process order
steps.content: The text describes pottery-making steps in sequence: Solis starts with the base, then builds the walls, then smooths them, and at last the pot is ready for painting.

steps.title: Choose the sequence marker
steps.content: A would make wall-building an example of making the base. B and C signal contrast, but the sentence continues the same procedure. The needed transition marks the following step in the sequence. The answer is D.
